title: Microsoft considers spinning off Xbox as an independent company
summary: Several media outlets report that Microsoft is evaluating separating Xbox into an independent company.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 development concludes
summary: The RPG concludes its development after eight months with a final patch and requested features.

title: Dead by Daylight gets a massive overhaul for its tenth anniversary
summary: Behaviour Interactive announces changes so profound that the game will be almost new.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 brings back early campaign access
summary: After three years, the new installment will let players play the campaign before the official release.

title: Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth and Remake gain players on Steam due to discounts
summary: Anticipation for the third part drives sales of the previous installments.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 removes its deluxe edition and controversial microtransactions
summary: Capcom removes the deluxe version and time-saving purchases following criticism.

title: Forza Horizon 6 releases mandatory patch to prevent progress loss
summary: Players must update to prevent saved game corruption.

title: Debate over Nintendo Switch 2 must-have features
summary: Nintendo Life asks the community which games and features are essential for the next console.

title: Microsoft CEO criticizes Xbox's low profits
summary: Satya Nadella points out that there is more monetization of Xbox games on YouTube than on the platform itself.

title: Capcom president reveals the keys to Resident Evil's success
summary: Haruo Tsujimoto explains the strategy behind the series' winning streak.

title: Investment fund pressures FromSoftware to make safer sequels
summary: The investor wants to distance itself from Bandai Namco; Miyazaki responds defending his approach.

title: Miyazaki alludes to unannounced games amid Kadokawa controversy
summary: The FromSoftware director mentions future projects while commenting on the situation of its parent company.

title: Blizzard sues another World of Warcraft private server
summary: The company accuses the server of massive and continuous intellectual property infringement.

title: Seven standout indies from Summer Game Fest you might have overlooked
summary: Kotaku selects notable indie titles from the deluge of announcements.

title: Sonic creator says the industry can learn from Backrooms' success
summary: The developer highlights the user-generated horror phenomenon as a model to follow.

title: Fumito Ueda expresses his disappointment with Sony over the treatment of Bluepoint Games
summary: The creator of The Last Guardian laments how Sony handled the studio responsible for remakes.

title: Persona 4 Revival could include content from Persona 4 Golden
summary: Polygon analyzes the possibilities of the remake incorporating the expanded version.

title: Returnal director discusses his influences from Deus Ex and Resident Evil
summary: Harry Krueger details how the classics shaped Housemarque's design.

title: Sonic head admits they cannot re-release many classic games
summary: Takashi Iizuka acknowledges the legal and technical difficulties in bringing back the old catalog.

title: Assembly-line MMOs are no longer viable, according to genre veterans
summary: Former developers of Ultima Online and SWG affirm that current costs make the model unsustainable.
